instruments.name: Hydrate Ridge Scanning Sonar (DIDSON/OVRSRA)
instruments.description: High-frequency scanning sonar (DIDSON) imaging methane bubble plumes rising from hydrate ridge seafloor. Data stored on PI web server.

instruments.name: ASHES Seafloor Mass Spectrometer (MASSP)
instruments.description: Seafloor mass spectrometer measuring dissolved gases (H2, H2S, CO2, CH4) in hydrothermal vent fluids at ASHES

instruments.name: RCA Distributed Acoustic Sensing (Optasense)
instruments.location: OOI Regional Cabled Array Fiber Optic Cable
instruments.description: Distributed Acoustic Sensing using the RCA fiber optic cable infrastructure. North and South cable segments. Records seismic and acoustic signals along the cable.

instruments.name: RCA Distributed Acoustic Sensing 2024 Deployment
instruments.location: OOI Regional Cabled Array Fiber Optic Cable
instruments.description: DAS deployment on the RCA fiber optic cable during 2024, with processed dphi (differential phase) data in HDF5 format.

instruments.name: RCA Distributed Acoustic Sensing 2025 Deployment
instruments.location: OOI Regional Cabled Array Fiber Optic Cable
instruments.description: Ongoing DAS deployment on the RCA fiber optic cable (2025–present) using MultiDAS and OptoDAS interrogators.

instruments.name: ASHES Cabled Observatory Vent Imaging Sonar (COVIS)
instruments.description: Reson 7125 multibeam sonar imaging hydrothermal plumes and diffuse flow at ASHES vent field. Measures 3D volume scattering strength and seafloor backscatter.

instruments.name: Oregon Slope Base Seafloor Continuous Pressure Recorder (SCPR)
instruments.description: PI-operated Paroscientific seafloor pressure recorder at Oregon Slope Base with dual Digiquartz transducers (PARO1, PARO2) for absolute pressure and geodetic monitoring.
instruments.format: Text log files with Paroscientific raw period data (1 Hz)

instruments.name: Axial Base Bottom Pressure Array (A0A)
instruments.description: PI-operated bottom pressure array at Axial Seamount base recording multiple Paroscientific pressure and temperature sensor period counts for geodetic monitoring.
instruments.format: CSV-format .dat files with UTC timestamps and pressure period counts

instruments.name: ASHES PI CTD (CTDPFA110)
instruments.description: PI-operated CTD profiler at ASHES hydrothermal vent field recording temperature, salinity, and pressure near the vent exit.

instruments.name: Hydrate Ridge Rotary Sonar (QNTSRA101)
instruments.description: PI-operated rotary sonar scanning the seafloor and water column above Hydrate Ridge for methane bubble detection and plume tracking.

instruments.name: Hydrate Ridge Fluid and Gas Sampler (RASSP)
instruments.description: PI-operated fluid and gas sampler collecting discrete geochemical samples from methane seep fluids and hydrate dissociation at Hydrate Ridge.
instruments.format: Text or CSV with discrete sample geochemistry
